principle: The dashboard is the Claire operating environment, not a dev dashboard.

sections.label: Command
sections.purpose: Launch, inspect, and govern live/local Claire runs.

sections.label: Sources
sections.purpose: Display configured source domains, trust state, freshness, and intake readiness.

sections.label: ACS2 Loops
sections.purpose: Show the external sensing loops that feed governed signals into the lifecycle.

sections.label: Signal Governance
sections.purpose: Render stages 1-5 and the governance stamp.

sections.label: Entity Intelligence
sections.purpose: Render stages 6-7, entities, and relationship mapping.

sections.label: Trend Discovery
sections.purpose: Render stages 8-10, thesis formation, clusters, and route gate inputs.

sections.label: Route Gate
sections.purpose: Show selected route, rejected routes, confidence, and reasons.

sections.label: Portfolio
sections.purpose: Render market positioning, competitor analysis, and portfolio creation or optimization.

sections.label: Breakthrough
sections.purpose: Render gap detection, discovery generation, breakthrough classification, and advancement path.

sections.label: AutoDesign
sections.purpose: Expose stages 16-22 as first-class route execution.

sections.label: Technology Intelligence
sections.purpose: Support design/software/system routes with catalog, matching, dependencies, and buildability context.

sections.label: Acquisition
sections.purpose: Render moat, business model, acquirer identification, fit, and final package readiness.

sections.label: Validation
sections.purpose: Make validation the final authority for any output.

sections.label: Evidence
sections.purpose: Provide evidence chain, traceability, contract compliance, and proof readiness.

sections.label: Memory
sections.purpose: Show verified memory eligibility and recursive feedback only after validation pass.

sections.label: Runtime
sections.purpose: Show runtime health, protected spine, isolation, launch continuity, and rollback state.

sections.label: Update Packs
sections.purpose: Draft dashboard and system update packs from architecture-map gaps.

non_negotiables: Stages 16-22 remain a dedicated route surface.
Dashboard renders runtime truth from output artifacts when available.
Only validated outputs can be marked memory eligible.
Rollback safety is preserved before replacing files.
